title: Zhou Rui
content:
Zhou Rui
 was accepted into 
Heng Yue Sect
 along side 
Wang Zhou
 who developed a crush on her.

She was one of the few friends 
Wang Lin
 had inside the Heng Yue Sect.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

History

2.1

Book One

2.2

Book Ten

3

Trivia

Appearance
[
]

She is a pretty and lively looking girl. While not as eye-catchingly gorgeous as Liu Mei, she still attracted quite a lot of attention from men 

History
[
]

Book One
[
]

She had a decent talent for cultivation and was among the best of her generation. She was friendly towards Wang Lin despite him being an outcast.

Book Ten
[
]

Wang Lin has a dream involving her and 
Xu Fei
 after he consumes three Dao Fruits to complete his Life and Death, Karma and True and False Essences. He encounters her in the rain and is welcomed onto her boat. Sensing some familiarity, Zhou Rui uses a spell to let him rest.

Trivia
[
]

Her full name, Zhou Rui, is revealed in a dream sequence in Book Ten, a full eight books since her last physical appearance in the story.
